steps.title: Write each bottle amount
steps.content: Each one-liter bottle contributes $1$ liter, so $x$ of them contribute $x$ liters. Each three-liter bottle contributes $3$ liters, so $y$ of them contribute $3y$ liters.

steps.title: Model the total liters
steps.content: The total is $240$ liters, so the equation is $$x+3y=240$$ The answer is A.
